description: Known cross-tool payloads that lack a septa schema, with rationale. Each entry must be reviewed before promotion to a full schema.

exemptions.rationale: Co-versioned in same workspace; low drift risk until repos separate. Shape is stable but not formally documented.
Session context JSON passed from hyphae to volva assemble_prompt. Co-versioned; drift detectable by integration test. Schema backlog item.

Claude Code's hook envelope format is defined by the Claude Code runtime, not this codebase. Cannot be schema-backed without owning the spec. Changes would be detected at runtime, not by validate-all.sh.
